title: Ciao UFO takes top prizes at Hong Kong Film Awards as Sons Of The Neon Night glows
description: Sci‐fi drama Ciao UFO was named best film, while crime thriller Sons of the Neon Night won eight prizes.

title: Trump Says UFO Files Release Imminent as Debate Intensifies Over ‘Unknown Phenomena’
description: President Donald Trump announced April 17 that his administration is preparing to release long-awaited government documents related to unidentified flying objects (UFOs) and unexplained aerial phenomena, signaling a renewed push for transparency on one of the most debated mysteries in modern history. The post Trump Says UFO Files Release Imminent as Debate Intensifies Over ‘Unknown Phenomena’ appeared first on Worthy Christian News .

title: When Will Donald Trump Release UFO Files? New Activity On alien.gov Explained
description: As alien.gov flickers to life and Donald Trump teases 'very interesting' UFO files, conspiracy forums are ablaze with speculation but hard evidence and official confirmation remain stubbornly out of reach.

title: Excellent Photo Of An Alien Craft Over India
description: 9-12-24 INDIA “I and my mom went on the terrace of our home after having dinner. We were sitting there and suddenly my mom saw something hanging in the sky. The direction was east and it was at about 50 m away from the city radio tower [...]
